header.title: Batch Profile Creation
header.description: Rapidly deploy multiple browser environments via spreadsheet or sequential generation.

step1.title: Download Template
step1.description: To ensure smooth parsing, please use our standardized Excel or CSV template. Fill in your profile names, proxies, and fingerprint rules.

step2.title: Upload & Preview
step2.description: Select your filled spreadsheet. We will parse it locally and check for formatting errors before saving.

awaiting.title: Awaiting Data
awaiting.description: Select a file to preview your structured profiles here.

autoBind.label: Auto-bind proxies by country
autoBind.descPrefix: — for rows without their own proxy, assign a saved proxy whose health-checked country matches the row's

quick.description: Spin up multiple profiles instantly without a spreadsheet — unique fingerprints, sequential names, a target group (create one inline), and proxy assignment from a specific group or provider. Uses the exact same engine as the Profiles page.

errors.parse: Failed to parse the file. Ensure it is a valid spreadsheet.
errors.commit: Failed to commit profiles to database.
